roles.scoped.title: Scoped Roles
roles.scoped.description: Grant additional roles restricted to a legal entity, site, or department.
tour.welcomeTitle: Welcome to Gulf Cryo Document Manager
tour.welcomeBody: Take a quick 60-second tour to learn your way around.
tour.step.brand.title: Your workspace
tour.step.brand.body: This is your home for Gulf Cryo letterhead documents.
tour.step.dashboard.title: Dashboard
tour.step.dashboard.body: Quick stats and recent activity at a glance.
tour.step.upload.title: Create a letterhead
tour.step.upload.body: Generate a new letterhead document here.
tour.step.archive.title: Document archive
tour.step.archive.body: Browse and download every document you have access to.
tour.step.templates.title: Letterhead templates
tour.step.templates.body: Create and manage the templates used across the company.
tour.step.approvals.title: Approvals
tour.step.approvals.body: Review and approve new user requests.
tour.step.logs.title: Activity logs
tour.step.logs.body: Audit every action across the system.
tour.step.admin.title: Admin portal
tour.step.admin.body: Manage entities, sites, departments, and roles.
tour.step.header.title: Theme & language
tour.step.header.body: Switch between dark/light mode and English/Arabic anytime.
tour.step.help.title: Need help later?
tour.step.help.body: Click here anytime to replay this tour or contact an admin.
tour.step.user.title: Your account
tour.step.user.body: Your role and status are shown here. Sign out anytime.
tour.picker.title: Pick a guide
tour.picker.body: Choose a quick walkthrough. You can replay any guide later from the help menu.
tour.guide.overview.title: Quick overview
tour.guide.overview.body: Tour the sidebar and main areas in 60 seconds.
tour.guide.upload.title: Create & download a document
tour.guide.upload.body: Walk through picking a template, uploading a file, and downloading the final letterhead.
tour.guide.archive.title: Browse the archive
tour.guide.archive.body: Find, filter and re-download any generated document.
tour.guide.logs.title: Read activity logs
tour.guide.logs.body: See who did what, when, and where across the system.
tour.upload.tpl.title: 1. Pick a template
tour.upload.tpl.body: Choose a letterhead. Templates scoped to your entity or site are grouped here.
tour.upload.file.title: 2. Add your file
tour.upload.file.body: Drop or click to upload a PDF, Word, text or image file.
tour.upload.cta.title: 3. Build the preview
tour.upload.cta.body: Once a template and file are set, this builds a preview with the letterhead applied.
tour.upload.preview.title: 4. Review
tour.upload.preview.body: Check the preview here, then generate the final serial-numbered PDF.
tour.upload.finalized.title: 5. Download & track
tour.upload.finalized.body: Copy the serial, download again, or jump straight to the archive entry.
tour.upload.done.title: You're set
tour.upload.done.body: Every generated document is logged. Find it later in Archive or Logs.
tour.archive.stats.title: At-a-glance
tour.archive.stats.body: Quick counts of the documents you have access to.
tour.archive.filters.title: Find anything fast
tour.archive.filters.body: Search by serial, file name, user, template, entity, site, or date.
tour.archive.export.title: Export
tour.archive.export.body: Download the filtered list as CSV.
tour.logs.filters.title: Filter the log
tour.logs.filters.body: Narrow events by action type, entity, site, or date range.
tour.logs.events.title: Every action, recorded
tour.logs.events.body: Creates, downloads, approvals and role changes are all here. Admins see everything; managers see their department; users see their own actions.
